name: permission-resolution-gap
description: No existing permission resolution infrastructure. Auth domain handles authentication but not authorization. Teams feature needs to implement: role hierarchy (owner > admin > member > viewer), additive permission union across hierarchy levels, and permission caching for performance.
recommendation: Implement resolvePermissions(userId, resourceId) that walks Org→Team→App chain, collects all Membership roles for user, returns max permission level. Consider MST computed view for caching.
